requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — SNI IEC 62368-1 / SNI IEC 60950-1 (BSN / SDPPI)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——SNI IEC 62368-1 / SNI IEC 60950-1（BSN / SDPPI）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——SNI IEC 62368-1 / SNI IEC 60950-1（BSN / SDPPI）

summary.en: Wireless and IoT devices with mains power supply or internal batteries above applicable voltage or energy thresholds must comply with Indonesian electrical safety standards under the SNI (Standar Nasional Indonesia) framework administered by BSN (Badan Standardisasi Nasional). The primary applicable standard for audio/video, information and communication technology equipment is SNI IEC 62368-1:2018 (adopted from IEC 62368-1:2018), which supersedes SNI IEC 60950-1 for IT equipment. For household appliances with an integrated wireless or IoT module, the SNI IEC 60335 series may additionally apply. Electrical safety testing must be conducted at BSN-accredited (LSPro) or SDPPI-recognised laboratories. Safety compliance evidence is submitted as part of the SDPPI sertifikasi perangkat application for powered wireless devices. For products falling under SNI wajib (mandatory SNI) product categories, a separate SPPT-SNI (Sertifikat Produk Penggunaan Tanda SNI) — issued by a BSN-accredited certification body — is required in addition to SDPPI type approval. No mutual recognition agreement exists between Indonesia and CE (EU Low Voltage Directive / EN 62368-1), UL/NRTL (US), or Chinese CCC safety certifications.
summary.zh: 带有市电供电或内置电池且电压或能量超出适用阈值的无线及物联网设备，须符合由BSN（国家标准化局）管理的SNI（印度尼西亚国家标准）框架下的电气安全标准。音视频、信息及通信技术设备适用的主要标准为SNI IEC 62368-1:2018（采纳自IEC 62368-1:2018），已取代信息技术设备的SNI IEC 60950-1。带有无线或物联网模块的家用电器还可能适用SNI IEC 60335系列标准。电气安全测试须在BSN认可（LSPro）或SDPPI认可的实验室进行。有源无线设备的安全合规证明须作为SDPPI sertifikasi perangkat申请的组成部分提交。属于SNI wajib（强制SNI）产品类别的产品，除SDPPI型号认证外，还须取得BSN认可认证机构颁发的单独SPPT-SNI（SNI标志产品认证证书）。印度尼西亚与CE（欧盟低电压指令/EN 62368-1）、UL/NRTL（美国）或中国CCC安全认证之间不存在相互认可协定。
summary.zht: 帶有市電供電或內置電池且電壓或能量超出適用閾值的無線及物聯網設備，須符合由BSN（國家標準化局）管理的SNI（印度尼西亞國家標準）框架下的電氣安全標準。音視頻、資訊及通訊技術設備適用的主要標準為SNI IEC 62368-1:2018（採納自IEC 62368-1:2018），已取代資訊技術設備的SNI IEC 60950-1。帶有無線或物聯網模組的家用電器還可能適用SNI IEC 60335系列標準。電氣安全測試須在BSN認可（LSPro）或SDPPI認可的實驗室進行。有源無線設備的安全合規證明須作為SDPPI sertifikasi perangkat申請的組成部分提交。屬於SNI wajib（強制SNI）產品類別的產品，除SDPPI型號認證外，還須取得BSN認可認證機構頒發的單獨SPPT-SNI（SNI標誌產品認證證書）。印度尼西亞與CE（歐盟低電壓指令/EN 62368-1）、UL/NRTL（美國）或中國CCC安全認證之間不存在相互認可協定。

standards_or_laws: SNI IEC 62368-1:2018 — Audio/video, information and communication technology equipment — Safety requirements (BSN, adopted from IEC 62368-1:2018)
SNI IEC 60950-1:2013 — Information technology equipment — Safety (legacy, still referenced for older product scopes not yet transitioned to IEC 62368-1)
SNI IEC 60335-1 / SNI IEC 60335-2 series — Household and similar electrical appliances — Safety (applicable for wireless-enabled home appliances, BSN)
Peraturan Pemerintah No. 34 Tahun 2018 tentang Sistem Standardisasi dan Penilaian Kesesuaian Nasional (National Standardization and Conformity Assessment System Regulation — SNI wajib mechanism)
Peraturan Menteri Kominfo No. 16 Tahun 2018 — SDPPI type approval requiring safety test evidence for powered wireless devices

summary.en: China's electrical safety framework for IT and consumer electronics primarily relies on GB 4943.1 (Information technology equipment — Safety, aligned with IEC 60950-1) and, for products transitioning to the IEC 62368-1 scope, the emerging GB 62368 adoption under SAC. CCC (China Compulsory Certification) under CNCA covers safety for most mains-powered electrical and electronic products including wireless devices. CCC safety testing is conducted at CNCA-designated, CNAS-accredited laboratories. Chinese CCC safety certificates and GB 4943.1 test reports are not recognised in Indonesia and do not satisfy SNI IEC 62368-1 or SPPT-SNI requirements.
summary.zh: 中国信息技术及消费电子产品的电气安全框架主要依据GB 4943.1（信息技术设备安全，与IEC 60950-1接轨），以及正在过渡至IEC 62368-1范围的SAC新版GB 62368采纳标准。CNCA主管的CCC（中国强制认证）涵盖大多数市电供电电气和电子产品（包括无线设备）的安全认证。CCC安全测试在CNCA指定、CNAS认可的实验室进行。中国CCC安全证书及GB 4943.1测试报告不被印度尼西亚承认，不能满足SNI IEC 62368-1或SPPT-SNI要求。
summary.zht: 中國資訊技術及消費電子產品的電氣安全框架主要依據GB 4943.1（資訊技術設備安全，與IEC 60950-1接軌），以及正在過渡至IEC 62368-1範圍的SAC新版GB 62368採納標準。CNCA主管的CCC（中國強制認證）涵蓋大多數市電供電電氣和電子產品（包括無線設備）的安全認證。CCC安全測試在CNCA指定、CNAS認可的實驗室進行。中國CCC安全證書及GB 4943.1測試報告不被印度尼西亞承認，不能滿足SNI IEC 62368-1或SPPT-SNI要求。

standards_or_laws: GB 4943.1 — Information technology equipment — Safety (aligned with IEC 60950-1, SAC/MIIT)
GB 62368 (in adoption) — Audio/video, information and communication technology equipment — Safety (aligned with IEC 62368-1)
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) safety — CNCA; tested at CNCA-designated CNAS-accredited laboratories

gap.en: Indonesian SNI IEC 62368-1 and Chinese GB 4943.1 share a common IEC 60950-1 / IEC 62368-1 lineage, but there is NO administrative equivalence or MRA. Chinese CCC safety certificates and GB 4943.1 test reports are not accepted by SDPPI or BSN. For products in mandatory SNI wajib scope, a separate SPPT-SNI from a BSN-accredited LSPro is required in addition to SDPPI type approval — this is a distinct certification process. Common exporter error: assuming CE Low Voltage Directive (EN 62368-1) compliance satisfies Indonesia — it does not. SNI-aligned safety testing at a BSN-accredited or SDPPI-recognised laboratory, plus an SPPT-SNI certificate where applicable, must be obtained before market entry.
gap.zh: 印度尼西亚SNI IEC 62368-1与中国GB 4943.1同源于IEC 60950-1 / IEC 62368-1体系，但不存在行政等效认可或相互认可协定。中国CCC安全证书及GB 4943.1测试报告不被SDPPI或BSN接受。属于强制SNI wajib范围的产品，除SDPPI型号认证外，还须从BSN认可LSPro取得单独的SPPT-SNI证书——这是一个独立的认证程序。常见出口商错误：误认为CE低电压指令（EN 62368-1）合规可满足印度尼西亚要求——实则不然。须在BSN认可或SDPPI认可实验室完成SNI对标安全测试，并在适用情况下取得SPPT-SNI证书，方可进入市场。
gap.zht: 印度尼西亞SNI IEC 62368-1與中國GB 4943.1同源於IEC 60950-1 / IEC 62368-1體系，但不存在行政等效認可或相互認可協定。中國CCC安全證書及GB 4943.1測試報告不被SDPPI或BSN接受。屬於強制SNI wajib範圍的產品，除SDPPI型號認證外，還須從BSN認可LSPro取得單獨的SPPT-SNI證書——這是一個獨立的認證程序。常見出口商錯誤：誤認為CE低電壓指令（EN 62368-1）合規可滿足印度尼西亞要求——實則不然。須在BSN認可或SDPPI認可實驗室完成SNI對標安全測試，並在適用情況下取得SPPT-SNI證書，方可進入市場。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — SNI IEC 62368-1 (or applicable SNI IEC 60950-1 / 60335 series) safety compliance required as part of SDPPI sertifikasi perangkat for powered wireless devices; SPPT-SNI additionally required for products in mandatory SNI wajib scope
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC (China Compulsory Certification) safety under CNCA for in-scope products; GB 4943.1 / emerging GB 62368 standards apply; tested at CNCA-designated CNAS-accredited laboratories

source.publisher: BSN (Badan Standardisasi Nasional) — SNI IEC 62368-1 / SNI IEC 60950-1

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] SNI electrical safety compliance (SNI IEC 62368-1 or applicable series) is mandatory for powered wireless devices as part of the SDPPI sertifikasi perangkat process. Chinese CCC safety certificates and GB 4943.1 test reports are not recognised by SDPPI or BSN. Products in mandatory SNI wajib categories additionally require SPPT-SNI from a BSN-accredited LSPro. No mutual recognition exists with CE Low Voltage Directive, US UL/NRTL listings, or Chinese CCC.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] SNI电气安全合规（SNI IEC 62368-1或适用系列）是有源无线设备SDPPI sertifikasi perangkat程序的强制要求。中国CCC安全证书及GB 4943.1测试报告不被SDPPI或BSN承认。属于强制SNI wajib类别的产品还须从BSN认可LSPro取得SPPT-SNI。与CE低电压指令、美国UL/NRTL认证或中国CCC不存在相互认可。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] SNI電氣安全合規（SNI IEC 62368-1或適用系列）是有源無線設備SDPPI sertifikasi perangkat程序的強制要求。中國CCC安全證書及GB 4943.1測試報告不被SDPPI或BSN承認。屬於強制SNI wajib類別的產品還須從BSN認可LSPro取得SPPT-SNI。與CE低電壓指令、美國UL/NRTL認證或中國CCC不存在相互認可。
